Off Calendar Nov-05-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Noel Boggins, owner of Celtic Scaffolding, Inc., Appellant/Defendant, with witness Henry Campbell.
Henry Wu, Respondent/Plaintiff is present.

This cause comes on regulary for trial de novo. All parties and witnesses are sworn.

No new exhibits are introduced.

At the conclusion of the hearing the Court upholds the previous judgment of the Court filed September 8, 2009 in behalf of the Plaintiff.

JUDGE RICHARD B. ULMER, CLERK:M. SMITH, NOT REPORTED (503)
